texto: Each little update - each individual bit of social information - is insignificant on its own, even supremely mundane. But taken together, over time, the little snippets coalesce into a surprisingly sophisticated portrait of your friends’ and family members’ lives, like thousands of dots making a pointillist painting.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alex Soojung-Kim Pang: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Each little update - each individual bit of social information - is insignificant on its own, eve…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, friends pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e friends.
